narrative:
Clay Twp (precinct in Gallia County) has 1,121 registered voters, with 47.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.4 percentage points.
